content.text:
The neighbour atom of O:10 (index 10) is N:9 (element N, index 9). The geomconf_index is 3447.

<answer>
Neighbour atoms: 9 (N)

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 10, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
